NAME: European Bioinformatics Institute
DESCRIPTION: **EMBL-EBI** is Europe’s flagship open-data hub for life science: it operates core INSDC services (**ENA**), genome annotation and browsing (**Ensembl**), protein knowledge (**UniProt**), functional-genomics archives (**BioStudies**, **Expression Atlas**), human variation submission (**EVA**), structural biology (**PDBe**), chemical biology (**ChEMBL**), and literature discovery (**Europe PMC**), alongside training and APIs. Many resources federate with global partners (NCBI, DDBJ, SIB) and with controlled-access archives such as the [EGA](https://ega-archive.org/) for sensitive human data.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: ENA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **European Nucleotide Archive**—INSDC member archive for raw reads, assemblies, and annotated sequences; exchanges metadata and accessions with [GenBank](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genbank/) and [DDBJ](https://www.ddbj.nig.ac.jp/).

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: UniProt
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: Curated **protein sequence and functional annotation** resource (UniProtKB, proteomes, isoforms); joint **EMBL-EBI**, **SIB**, and **PIR**.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: Ensembl
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Genome browser and annotation** for vertebrates and selected model organisms—genes, variants, comparative genomics, and REST/API access aligned with reference assemblies.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: BioStudies
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Study-centric metadata warehouse** for life-science experiments; hosts and links **ArrayExpress**-style functional-genomics studies alongside imaging and other modalities.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: Expression Atlas
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Baseline and differential expression** summaries from RNA-seq and microarray studies, with reproducible pipelines and cross-study query.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: EVA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **European Variation Archive**—open repository for VCF-scale **genetic variant** submissions with study-level metadata, complementing reference browsers.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: Europe PMC
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Literature and preprint** search with full-text open-access articles, grants, and links to molecular datasets cited in papers.
